description.ko: 영원한 네온 비 아래 홀로그램 자연과 산업 거대 구조물이 충돌하는 낭만적인 사이버펑크 도시 풍경입니다.
description.en: A romanticized cyberpunk cityscape where holographic nature and industrial megastructures collide under a perpetual neon rain.

prompt: A cinematic wide-angle shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Electric Lotus Megacity.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are overgrown with massive 3D holographic lotuses blooming in #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan light. Heavy monsoon rain creates a kaleidoscopic distortion on wet metallic asphalt. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through a dense, smoky volumetric atmosphere. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced puddle reflections, 8k resolution, capturing the romantic and melancholic soul of a future urban landscape.
